channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip and rubbish, 23rd April
item.description:
Dumped items on Faversham Road, along with trash lining the street outside the shop on the corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in back garden road, 23rd April
item.description:
The flytipping in the backgarden road is getting worse and worse. Can we start having locks on gates again? It might also being done by the slum hut builders in the Malvern Road back gardens themselves, but we need to stop it somehow.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Scales Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near corner of Chalcot Road and Fitzroy Road, opposite the Princess of Wales., 23rd April
item.description:
Some barriers that were used during a repair to the pavement outside no. 20 Fitzroy Road in February have since been moved (probably by scaffolders) and are now lying by the tree that was planted last year. I have taken a photo but this page won't accept it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Primrose Hill Studios, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 17 Raydon Street, 23rd April
item.description:
Disabled parking sign broken and lying on pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Raydon Street, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tip, 23rd April
item.description:
Tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welford Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Weeds, 23rd April
item.description:
It seems like half the close was weed treated but the rest not. It's especially bad behind houses 50 to 48 and alone the pavement outside flats 24 to 29 along to 36 to 41 gallon

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 23rd April
item.description:
On the first corner of gallon close se78sy on the grass all different household items including old bikes
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton

item.title: Abandoned, 23rd April
item.description:
This vehicle has been abandoned here for two weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the Garden of 48 Bartholomew Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Resident is an enhanced tenant and is reporting an overgrown hedge that is really spikey. They have spoken to repairs and were advised to contact trees. Please can this be looked. The tenant is elderly and vulnerable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawford Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction by overhanging vegetation, 23rd April
item.description:
Severely overgrown vegetation has encroached onto the pavement to the extent that it is no longer safely passable. As a mother of a young baby, I am currently unable to navigate this section with a stroller without being forced dangerously close to traffic. The obstruction is located on a bend, further increasing the risk, and you currently cannot properly see the traffic light leading away from Beckenham and onto Bromley Road (see photo). The issue is compounded by the absence of a pedestrian crossing at this busy junction, meaning pedestrians already face difficulty crossing safely. In its current state, the junction presents a clear and immediate risk, with both pedestrian access and visibility of traffic signals and signage compromised. I have attached photographs showing the extent of the obstruction. This situation is unacceptable and requires urgent intervention. I request that the responsible authority takes immediate action to: • Remove or cut back the obstructing vegetation • Restore safe pedestrian access • Ensure full visibility of traffic lights and signage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible Hemlock water-dropwort, 23rd April
item.description:
There seems to be a large amount of this plant growing along the banks of the pond in a public park (The Glades) near many schools. My plant identification may be wrong, but good to double check

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out motorbike, 23rd April
item.description:
Can Idverde please arrange for the burnt out motorbike to be removed. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beamish Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge overgrown tree., 23rd April
item.description:
Massive tree, needs trimming. Makes mess everywhere.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allens Road, Enfield

item.title: Graffiti on derelict house side way, 23rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on side wall facing public footpath. Also on fence of public footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Amazon box dumped on Lassell Street, 23rd April
item.description:
Great if you can pick this up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Charlton Church Lane, 23rd April
item.description:
There is constant rubbish by Charlton Church Lane right by the bus stop. Rubbish (both in bags and food scraps thrown all over the pavement) has been there consistently for around 3 months now. This is a big issue as it forces people to walk on the road to get around it- very dangerous! As the weather begins to warm up, the food all over the pavement will begin to attract maggots / foxes. This needs to be avoided.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter, 23rd April
item.description:
Excessive Litter Other litter Lat/Long - 51.4069999, -0.065009 what3words - super.nearly.snake Nearest address - 5 Weighton Road, Penge, London, SE20 8TN

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Weighton Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Litter issue, 23rd April
item.description:
Lots of litter on the pavements and gutters in this section of Newlands Park. Could it be cleaned up please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Children’s playground gate will not remain closed, 23rd April
item.description:
The gate to the children’s playground in old farm park no longer shuts all the way, and when shut it swings open. This presents an issue with both young children being able to leave the playground and dogs being able to enter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northbourne Court, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
